# Reddy Steady Go LLC

Reddy Steady Go LLC is an Omaha, Nebraska contractor providing concrete, masonry, commercial asphalt paving, parking lot maintenance, mudjacking, and concrete repair services.

## Business Facts

- Legal name: Reddy Steady Go LLC
- Owner / principal contact: Kris Reddy
- Address: 13811 L Street, Omaha, NE 68137
- Phone: (402) 415-9253
- Email: Kris@reddysteadygo.com
- Website: https://reddysteadygo.com/

## Services

- Concrete flatwork: driveways, patios, sidewalks, curb work, slabs, foundations, garage floors, stamped and decorative concrete
- Masonry: brick, block, stone, retaining walls, chimney repair, tuckpointing, steps, entryways, hardscapes
- Commercial paving: asphalt paving, parking lots, overlays, sealcoating, crack filling, striping, ADA-conscious layouts, maintenance
- Concrete repair: mudjacking, slab lifting, leveling, crack repair, resurfacing, trip-hazard removal

## Service Areas

Omaha, Papillion, La Vista, Bellevue, Ralston, Millard, Elkhorn, Gretna, and Council Bluffs.

## Buyer And Procurement Notes

Reddy Steady Go LLC works with homeowners, property managers, commercial operators, general contractors, and municipal buyers. Written scope, company details, NAICS classifications, insurance documentation, references, and project-specific review information can be requested directly from Kris Reddy.

## Website Features

- The visual identity uses the supplied RSG shield/road logo and a black, red, gold, and concrete-silver theme.
- The homepage includes an interactive project planner that helps visitors create a concise estimate request for concrete, masonry, commercial paving, or concrete repair work.
- The contact form can receive a prefilled estimate message from the planner and falls back to a prefilled email when no form-service key is configured.
- The capabilities page includes a buyer hub with a procurement packet request link, bid intake checklist, and print-ready capability page.
- The capabilities page includes a one-click company information copy action for procurement and prime-contractor review.
- Desktop visitors get a page-aware quick-action dock for project planning, phone calls, estimates, and buyer information.
- The homepage service-area router points visitors to local pages for Papillion, Bellevue, La Vista, Elkhorn, Council Bluffs, and the Omaha metro.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://reddysteadygo.com/
- Services: https://reddysteadygo.com/services.html
- Capabilities: https://reddysteadygo.com/capabilities.html
- Service Areas: https://reddysteadygo.com/areas/
- Contact: https://reddysteadygo.com/contact.html
